name: Helen's Holiday Float
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald all but 1/2 cup of the milk in the top of a large double boiler.
2. Separate the eggs.
3. In a large bowl, beat the yolks well while gradually adding 1 cup sugar and flour combined with 1/2 cup cold milk.
4. Gradually add hot milk to the mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Place back into the double boiler and cook until thickened, stirring continuously.
6. Remove from heat, stir in whiskey, brandy, and vanilla extract.
7. Sprinkle nutmeg on the bottom of a large baking bowl.
8. In another bowl, beat egg whites while gradually adding 2 tablespoons sugar until stiff peaks form.
9. Place the beaten egg white mixture on top of the custard.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes or until the topping turns golden brown.
11. Chill before serving.
